LOKI_HOSTNAME.description: The hostname or URL of the Loki instance to send logs to (e.g., http://loki:3100)

LOKI_PORT.description: The port number of the Loki instance to send logs to (e.g., 3100)

ADMIN_EMAILS.description: Comma-separated list of emails who will get the 'admin' scope. Emails must be validated to receive this scope.
